requirement: Map hardened reusable assets from PHR and Digital Marketing for Tutorputor planning

fromPHR.rationale: Provides consent lifecycle and audit evidence for learning records and guardian consent.
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: Student data collection consent, learning analytics consent, parental consent for minors

fromPHR.rationale: Provides tenant-scoped, student-visible audit trail pattern.
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: Learning event audit, educator access audit, mastery model change audit

fromPHR.rationale: Provides post-hoc review workflow for exceptional educator overrides.
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: Educator override review for safety-critical tutoring intervention

fromPHR.rationale: Provides regulated rollback gates for data integrity and approval evidence.
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: Learning record and mastery model rollback readiness

fromDMOS.rationale: Provides approval queue pattern for curriculum and generated content publishing.
fromDMOS.tutorputorUseCase: Human approval for high-risk generated lesson plans and assessments

fromDMOS.rationale: Provides AI action transparency records for prompt, model, confidence, risk, policy, approval, and outcome.
fromDMOS.tutorputorUseCase: AI tutoring transparency and educator review trail
